headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .160 / .323 / .160.

nightly_recap: The Royals beat the Tampa Bay Rays, KC 2, TB 1. Michael Wacha led the night, working 7.0 innings with 1 earned runs, 5 strikeouts and 1 walk. Carter Jensen supplied the loudest Royals contact at 109.2 mph.

player_of_game.name: Michael Wacha
player_of_game.reason: worked 7.0 innings with 1 earned runs, 5 strikeouts and 1 walk.
